name: Diagnostic Mammography Procedure Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes specifically for diagnostic mammography (as distinct from screening mammography). Includes unilateral and bilateral diagnostic mammography and digital breast tomosynthesis. Used in breast cancer screening (BCS) measure where diagnostic mammography may also satisfy the numerator.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Diagnostic mammography, including computer-aided detection (CAD) when performed; unilateral
Diagnostic mammography, including computer-aided detection (CAD) when performed; bilateral
Screening mammography, bilateral, including computer-aided detection (CAD) when performed
Screening mammography, bilateral, producing direct digital image
Diagnostic mammography, producing direct digital image, bilateral, all views
Diagnostic mammography, producing direct digital image, unilateral, all views
Diagnostic digital breast tomosynthesis, unilateral or bilateral
Mammography, bilateral (historical code — may appear in legacy claims)
Mammography, unilateral (historical code — may appear in legacy claims)
